descs.desc:
At 5+ [Breath] on self, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count

coinDescs: [CriticalOnSucceedAttack] To 1 ally either with no [Breath] or with the least [Breath] Potency, apply 2 [Breath]
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] To 1 ally either with no [Breath] or with the least [Breath] Potency, apply 2 [Breath]

descs.desc:
At 7+ [Breath] on self, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] To 1 ally either with no [Breath] or with the least [Breath] Potency, apply 2 [Breath]
If the affected ally is from the Blade Lineage, apply 2 additional [Breath]

[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] To 2 allies either with no [Breath] or with the least [Breath] Count, apply +2 [Breath] Count
[EndSkill] If target is defeated, gain 1 [SlashDamageUp] next turn

descs.desc:
At 10+ [Breath] on self, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain 5 [Breath]
coinDescs:
+30% Damage on Critical Hit
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] To 2 allies either with no [Breath] or with the least [Breath] Count, apply +2 [Breath] Count.
If the affected ally is from the Blade Lineage, apply 2 additional [Breath] Count
[EndSkill] If target is defeated, apply 1 [SlashDamageUp] to self and 1 random other ally next turn

1030801.name: Collective Breathing
1030801.desc: When this unit gains [Breath] Potency with its own Skill or Coin effects: give 1 [Breath] Potency to 1 ally with no [Breath] or with the least [Breath] Potency (3 times max)

1030811.name: Collective Breathing
1030811.desc: When this unit gains [Breath] Potency with its own Skill or Coin effects: give 1 [Breath] Potency to 1 ally with no [Breath] or with the least [Breath] Potency (5 times max)

1030821.name: Nightly Stroll
1030821.desc: 1 ally with the least [Breath] gains 1 more [Breath] Potency when gaining [Breath] Potency with its own Skill or Coin effects. (2 times max. Does not apply to allies without [Breath])

1030831.name: Nightly Stroll
1030831.desc: 1 ally with the least [Breath] gains 2 more [Breath] Potency when gaining [Breath] Potency with its own Skill or Coin effects. (2 times max. Does not apply to allies without [Breath])
